prose:
Fukui reactivity indices for acrolein were computed using DFT with the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set (tier standard, density-fitted) in PySCF at gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. The geometry was taken as-is from the user-supplied file. Mulliken partial charges were computed for the neutral, cation (+1, doublet), and anion (−1, doublet) states, yielding Fukui indices f⁺ (electrophilic reactivity), f⁻ (nucleophilic reactivity), and the dual descriptor Δf = f⁺ − f⁻. All SCF runs converged. The most electrophilic site is the terminal vinyl carbon C4 (f⁺ = 0.6423), and the most nucleophilic site is the carbonyl oxygen O1 (f⁻ = 0.3939). The charge-conservation sums for f⁺ and f⁻ both equal 1.000, confirming internal consistency. Integrity status: trustworthy (ok).</prose>
